name: Kronos Workforce Central API (UKG)
what_it_does: Kronos Workforce Central (UKG Workforce Central) REST API for enterprise workforce management including time and attendance, scheduling, and labor management. Enables AI agents to manage employee time tracking and punch management for payroll-accurate labor data, handle shift scheduling and demand-driven schedule generation for labor optimization, access accrual balances and leave management for absence management, retrieve labor analytics and productivity metrics for workforce insights, manage manager approval workflow for timecard exceptions, handle multi-jurisdiction pay rule calculations for complex labor environments, access employee availability and shift preference data for scheduling optimization, retrieve workforce forecasting and demand planning data for staffing models, manage union rule enforcement and work agreement compliance, and integrate Kronos time and attendance data with payroll, HRIS, and ERP platforms.
use_cases: Automating timecard approval from workforce management agents
Optimizing shift schedules from labor planning agents
Tracking accrual balances from leave management agents
Integrating time data with payroll from payroll processing agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise workforce management complexity
Simple punch clock without multi-department scheduling needs
White-collar salaried-only environments without hourly/shift scheduling
best_when: A large enterprise with hourly or shift workers using Kronos Workforce Central (UKG) wants AI agents to automate timecard management, schedule optimization, exception handling, and labor analytics.
avoid_when: LABOR LAW RISK: Kronos pay rule automation encodes complex multi-jurisdiction labor laws (state overtime, union CBA rules, FLSA) — automated pay rule modification without employment law review creates wage and hour violation liability. Schedule automation must account for predictive scheduling laws (Oregon, New York City, Chicago) requiring advance notice for schedule changes. Kronos Workforce Central is being migrated to UKG Pro WFM (formerly Dimensions); integration investment in Workforce Central may need rework.

auth.notes: Kronos Workforce Central uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.ukg.com. Webhooks for workforce events. REST API with JSON. Lowell, Massachusetts HQ (UKG). UKG formed from Kronos + Ultimate Software merger (2020). Kronos founded 1977. 50,000+ customers globally. Kronos Workforce Central is legacy product; UKG Pro WFM (formerly UKG Dimensions) is next-gen platform. Competes with Ceridian Dayforce, WorkForce Software, and Infor WFM for enterprise workforce management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription plus implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee; implementation services
pricing.notes: Lowell, Massachusetts. UKG formed 2020 (Kronos + Ultimate Software). Kronos founded 1977. 50,000+ customers. Workforce Central is legacy platform. UKG Pro WFM (Dimensions) is strategic product. Competes with Ceridian Dayforce, WorkForce Software, and Oracle for enterprise workforce management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: LABOR LAW RISK: Kronos pay rules encode FLSA, state overtime, and union CBA rules; automated pay rule changes without employment law review creates wage and hour violation liability

Predictive scheduling laws — Oregon, New York City, Chicago, and other jurisdictions require advance schedule notice; automated schedule changes without notice period compliance creates legal exposure
Workforce Central to UKG Pro WFM migration — Kronos is migrating customers from Workforce Central to UKG Pro WFM (Dimensions); integration investment in Workforce Central API may require rework
Union rule complexity — Kronos union contract rule encoding is complex; automated scheduling that violates CBA work rules creates grievance and arbitration risk
Timecard lock periods — Kronos timecards lock after payroll processing; automated corrections after lock require supervisor override with audit trail
Biometric time clock integration — Kronos InTouch time clocks have separate biometric data handling requirements; BIPA (Illinois) and state biometric laws apply to punch data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise WFM. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Time, scheduling, and labor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Workforce management. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Time, attendance, and labor data.
